failures.test_name: Validate ID Verification Underage Improvements - Underage Registration
failures.key_investigative_step: Computing the exact idvBirthdate from the AdminPASApiSteps.java formula and comparing against account_created (today - 10 days) — revealing the exact 18-year leap-year boundary condition
failures.notes: Root cause: idvBirthdate = today.minusYears(19).plusDays(356) lands on 2008-03-01 when today=2026-03-11, exactly 18 years before account_created (2026-03-01). Strict < 18 returns false. Fix: anchor idvBirthdate to accountCreated.minusYears(18).plusDays(1). Also: face-comparison pattern false-positively matched on generic 'Expected: a string containing' signature — consider requiring score >= 5 or keyword co-occurrence.

failures.test_name: Validation Not Met - Username criteria for Profile Auto-Moderation - Attractive Member (Auto-Approved after First Name Approval)
failures.key_investigative_step: Cross-referencing conditional rendering in approvals.blade.php with dispatchSync call in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php — realising requestData is only passed in async queue path, not sync
failures.notes: Root cause: ProcessDragynTextAssessment::dispatchSync omits Dragyn::getRequestData() — qa_reason never reaches the job. Real Dragyn called instead of mock, returns MODERATE with empty reason. approvals.blade.php @if(!empty(reason)) gates the span. Fix: pass requestData in dispatchSync path in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php
